Then run these commands to add implementation plans to Phase 1 CLI tasks.

For SM-gtv.5 (setup + init):
bd update SM-gtv.5 --description "$(bd show SM-gtv.5 --json | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)[0]['description'])")

## Implementation Plan
- Package: cmd/ (add to root.go or new setup.go, init.go)
- setup: golang.org/x/term for hidden password prompt, confirm password match
- Generate global salt: crypto/rand.Read(32 bytes), hex encode
- Store in ~/.envmoat/config.yaml: {version: 1, salt: "..."}
- Shell hook install: detect rc file (~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc), grep for __envmoat_hook, append if missing
- Hook: zsh chpwd + bash PROMPT_COMMAND (see PLAN.md for exact hook scripts)
- --reset flag: re-run password + hook setup
- init: create .envmoat marker (empty), create bundle, add to index.json auto section
- Auto-bundle name: auto-<slugified-last-dirname>.enc, collision: append -<short-hash>
- Auto-append .envmoat to .gitignore
- Dependencies: SM-gtv.7 (encryption), SM-gtv.1 (backend)
- Acceptance: setup creates config.yaml + installs hook, init creates marker + bundle + index entry, idempotent hook install, --reset works" 2>&1

For SM-gtv.2 (set + get + list):
bd update SM-gtv.2 --description "$(bd show SM-gtv.2 --json | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)[0]['description'])")

## Implementation Plan
- Package: cmd/ (set.go, get.go, list.go) or add to root.go
- set: resolve bundle via resolver, decrypt, update JSON, re-encrypt, atomic write
- Interactive prompt: golang.org/x/term.ReadPassword(0, os.Stdin, prompt)
- --stdin: io.ReadAll(os.Stdin)
- --file: parse .env format (KEY=VALUE, skip # comments, handle quotes)
- Key validation: regexp `^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$`
- Size warning: len(value) > 1MB -> stderr warning
- get: resolve bundle, decrypt, fmt.Print(value) to stdout
- list: resolve bundle, decrypt, print keys only + active profile name
- Context resolution: resolver.Resolve() -> bundle path, error if not tracked
- Dependencies: SM-gtv.7 (encryption), SM-gtv.4 (resolver)
- Acceptance: set/get roundtrip, list shows keys no values, --stdin works, --file bulk import, key validation rejects invalid chars, size warning at 1MB" 2>&1

For SM-gtv.3 (load + remove + deinit + verify):
bd update SM-gtv.3 --description "$(bd show SM-gtv.3 --json | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)[0]['description'])")

## Implementation Plan
- Package: cmd/ (load.go, remove.go, deinit.go, verify.go) or add to root.go
- load: resolve bundle, decrypt, emit shell-safe output
- Shell-safe: single-quote all values, escape internal ' as '''
- First line: #bundle_hash:sha256:<hash> for change detection
- Errors to stderr, exit 0 no output when no bundle
- remove: resolve bundle, decrypt, delete key, re-encrypt, atomic write, confirmation prompt
- deinit: remove .envmoat marker, remove bundle file, remove from index.json, confirmation
- verify: iterate all bundles in index.json, attempt decrypt, report orphans
- Confirmation: fmt.Print("Are you sure? [y/N] "), read stdin, check 'y' or 'Y'
- -y/--yes flag: skip confirmation
- Dependencies: SM-gtv.7 (encryption), SM-gtv.4 (resolver)
- Acceptance: load emits valid shell exports, single quotes escaped, hash line present, remove deletes key, deinit cleans up, verify detects orphans" 2>&1

echo "Done updating Phase 1 CLI tasks."
